title: Q2 enterprise win rate sits at 31% versus 22% trailing four quarters

connect: Marketing-sourced enterprise deals convert at 29% compared to outbound at 14%.
body: Eight enterprise deals closed won in Q2 from 26 total opportunities, with average deal size at $187K. Marketing-sourced enterprise deals convert at 29% compared to outbound at 14%.
trace: Q2 enterprise win rate 30.77% significantly outpacing trailing four quarter baseline of 22.22%, with clear source performance differential.
